word: G4897 - συνεισέρχομαι - syneisérchomai - soon-ice-er'-khom-ahee - Go in with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συνεισέρχομαι

- Transliteration: suneiserchomai

- Phonetic: soon-ice-er'-khom-ahee

- Definition:

1. to enter together

- Origin: from G4862 and G1525

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G1525; to enter in company with: - go in with go with into.
